## Versioning

If this PR changes templates, setup scripts, or generator code:

- [ ] Bumped version in `VERSION`
- [ ] Added entry to `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Version bump type: **patch** / **minor** / **major** *(delete two)*

> **Semver guide:** patch = fixes | minor = new features | major = breaking config/output changes
